text.title: Python Async Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Python Async Patterns end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: inventory-async-drivers
step.action: List every HTTP/DB/queue lib; flag sync ones for replacement.
step.decision-gate: Reject empty list - cannot be async without async drivers.

step.name: set-timeout-policy
step.decision-gate: Reject network await without timeout context.

step.name: sync-offload
step.decision-gate: Reject inline sync on hot path.
